title: SMBImesh - Southern Moreton Bay Islands, QLD, Australia

messages.author: Hilton Travis
messages.text: I am setting up some solar nodes over here because we have semi-regular power outages and notoriously poor mobile phone reception, and after Cyclone Alfred earlier this year we need something reliable. 923.125 MHz, 62.5 KHz, SF=8, CR=5 These settings will match up with the nodes in Brisbane, extending the reach for everyone. (edited)
messages.content_html: I am setting up some solar nodes over here because we have semi-regular power outages and notoriously poor mobile phone reception, and after Cyclone Alfred earlier this year we need something reliable. 923.125 MHz, 62.5 KHz, SF=8, CR=5 These settings will match up with the nodes in Brisbane, extending the reach for everyone. (edited)
messages.reactions_html: 3
